text.title: Release Strategy: Canary / Blue-Green / Feature-Flag Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Release Strategy: Canary / Blue-Green / Feature-Flag output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: single strategy applied to all service shapes
feature flag lifespan > 180 days with no cleanup

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: service_strategy_map populated with a typed value
observation_windows populated with a typed value
rollback_triggers populated with a typed value
feature_flag_policy populated with a typed value
review_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
